Hero.title: Discover quality
Hero.subtitle: Premium products at exceptional prices. Free shipping on orders over $50.

Home.description: Discover high-quality products at competitive prices. Shop now for the best deals on electronics, fashion, home goods, and more.
Home.ogDescription: Discover high-quality products at competitive prices.

highQuality.description: Premium products carefully selected for you

bestPrices.title: Best prices
bestPrices.description: Competitive pricing on all our products

Product.addedToCartDescription: {name} has been added to your cart
Product.errorAddToCart: Failed to add item to cart

shipping.question: What are your shipping options?
shipping.answer: We offer standard shipping (5-7 business days), express shipping (2-3 business days), and next-day delivery for select areas. Free standard shipping is available on orders over $50.

returns.question: What is your return policy?
returns.answer: We accept returns within 30 days of purchase. Items must be unused and in their original packaging. Contact our support team to start a return and receive a prepaid shipping label.

tracking.question: How can I track my order?
tracking.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive an email with a tracking number. You can also track your order in your account.

international.question: Do you offer international shipping?
international.answer: Yes! We ship to over 50 countries worldwide. Shipping rates and delivery times vary by location and are shown at checkout.
